Overview Nakashi CNC

Nakashi CNC is established in the year 2021,located in Nashik,Maharashtra,India.We have 20 years of experience in Engraving and Micro-Milling Products and Services.The 5Axis CNC machine available in market is too expensive ,so we gathered knowledge about the machine and started it’s manufacturing in our company.Our aim is to provide a high precision machine at affordable cost to our customers.

Read More...
WHY US ?

Choosing Nakashi CNC means opting for innovation, expertise, and sustainability. With 20 years of industry experience, we deliver superior Engraving and Micro-Milling solutions at an affordable cost. Under Tushar Tambat's guidance, we prioritize energy-efficient design, waste management, and sustainable sourcing. We are committed to customer satisfaction and continuous improvement, providing high-quality, precise machines.

QUALITY ASSURANCE

Quality is the cornerstone of Nakashi CNC's operations. We adhere to stringent quality control measures at every manufacturing stage to ensure our machines meet the highest precision standards. Our state-of-the-art facility uses the latest technology to maintain consistency and excellence. From sourcing materials to rigorous testing, we pursue perfection in every detail.

OUR TEAM

At Nakashi CNC, our team comprises seasoned professionals passionate about innovation in Engraving and Micro-Milling. Led by Tushar Tambat, who emphasizes sustainable practices, we deliver energy-efficient solutions. With over 20 years of experience, we design and manufacture high precision 5Axis CNC machines. We focus on meeting customers' evolving needs while maintaining affordability.
